subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 01/26] nfs4.1: add proposed NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, to the NFSv4 protocol. The flag is proposed in RFC8881bis and allows for extensions to original directory delegations specified in RFC8881. In practice, this means that if a client requests anything other than a recall-only delegation from an NFS server running Linux, it must support this new flag.
